title: Support property-local variables and sequence match items
body:
## Summary

This patch adds support for property-local variable declarations (IEEE 1800-2023 16.10) and sequence match item assignments (IEEE 1800-2023 16.11), enabling patterns such as `(expr, var = val) |=> consequent` in SVA properties.

## Reproducer

```systemverilog
module t (input clk);
  int cyc = 0;
  logic valid;

  property p_nonoverlap;
    int prev;
    @(posedge clk)
    (valid, prev = cyc) |=> (cyc == prev + 1);
  endproperty
  assert property (p_nonoverlap);
endmodule
```

On master:
```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t.v:8:11: Unsupported: sequence match items
    8 |     (valid, prev = cyc) |=> (cyc == prev + 1);
      |           ^
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t.v:6:9: Unsupported: property variable declaration
    6 |     int prev;
      |         ^~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
```

## Changes

- `src/verilog.y`: Remove `BBUNSUP` for `property_declarationBody` with `assertion_variable_declarationList`, passing local variable AST nodes through instead of deleting them. Remove `BBUNSUP` for sequence match items in `sexpr`, wrapping them in `AstExprStmt`.
- `src/V3AssertPre.cpp` (`substitutePropertyCall`): After substituting property port arguments, lower property-local (non-port) variables to module-level `MODULETEMP` variables with unique `__Vpropvar` names and update references in the cloned property body.
- `src/V3AssertPre.cpp` (`visit(AstImplication*)`): Extract match item assignments from `AstExprStmt` in the antecedent, substitute property-local variable references in the consequent with the assigned expressions, wrapping in `AstPast` for non-overlapping (`|=>`) implications.
- `src/V3AssertPre.cpp` (`getPropertyExprp`): Skip `AstInitialStaticStmt`/`AstInitialAutomaticStmt` nodes (variable initializers) when locating the `AstPropSpec` body.
- `src/V3Width.cpp` (`visit(AstProperty*)`): Iterate `AstInitialStaticStmt`/`AstInitialAutomaticStmt` nodes under `AstProperty` instead of hitting `v3fatalSrc`.

## Test

- Added `test_regress/t/t_sequence_local_var.{v,py}` -- property-local variables with overlapping (`|->`), non-overlapping (`|=>`), and parameterized property instantiation scenarios.
- Updated `test_regress/t/t_property_var_unsup.out` -- removed now-supported "property variable declaration" and "sequence match items" error messages.
- Updated `test_regress/t/t_property_sexpr_parse_unsup.out` -- removed now-supported "property variable declaration" and "sequence match items" error messages.

---
Developed by PlanV GmbH, assisted with Claude Code.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
